task_completion.description: Verify the countries shapefile is loaded into QGIS
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Layers panel in the main QGIS window shows the 'ne_110m_admin_0_countries' layer.

task_completion.description: Verify a Print Layout named 'Country_Report' is created
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Print Layout window is open with the title bar showing 'Country_Report'.

task_completion.description: Verify Atlas is enabled and filtered for Brazil
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Atlas panel of the Print Layout, 'Generate an atlas' is checked, the Coverage layer is set to 'ne_110m_admin_0_countries', and the 'Filter with' checkbox is checked with the expression '"NAME" = \'Brazil\''.

task_completion.description: Verify a map item is added and controlled by the Atlas
task_completion.visual_evidence: A map item is present on the layout canvas. In the Item Properties panel for this map, the 'Controlled by Atlas' checkbox is checked.

task_completion.description: Verify the Atlas map is exported to the correct PDF path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal, QGIS export dialog, or success message showing 'brazil_atlas_map.pdf' saved in the '/home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the QGIS project is saved to the correct path
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main QGIS window title bar shows 'atlas_project.qgz' or a save dialog/terminal shows the file saved in '/home/ga/GIS_Data/projects/'.

integrity.description: The agent used the QGIS GUI to configure the Atlas and layout
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with QGIS menus, the Print Layout window, Atlas panel, and Item Properties panel, rather than just running a python script or terminal commands to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The map item actually displays the geographical shape of Brazil
integrity.visual_evidence: The map canvas in the Print Layout shows the distinct geographical shape of Brazil, confirming the shapefile was properly loaded and rendered, not just an empty box.

integrity.description: The agent saved the files to the exact requested directories
integrity.visual_evidence: Save dialogs or terminal verifications explicitly show the '/home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/' and '/home/ga/GIS_Data/projects/' paths, not just the default home directory or desktop.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target shapefile is 'ne_110m_admin_0_countries'. The Print Layout must be named 'Country_Report'. The Atlas filter expression must be exactly '"NAME" = \'Brazil\' '. The map item must have 'Controlled by Atlas' checked in its Item Properties. The final PDF must be named 'brazil_atlas_map.pdf' in '/home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/' and the project 'atlas_project.qgz' in '/home/ga/GIS_Data/projects/'.
